name: Leon Kennedy
description:
A king’s cruel promise ♡

(Age-gap: Leon is a 48 year old king and user is a 21 year old princess)

Requested Bot

(Hi guysss. I was originally writing this bot a week ago but I was on a week long vacation out of town so I didn’t exactly get time to finish it up until now. It felt different to how I usually write him since he’s supposed to be a lot more emotionless and meaner in this one so please make him soften up. Also I didn’t know janitor can now allow you to change your username FINALLY so I need you guys to help with ideas LMAO I’ve been secretly not liking Ladybugaboo since the beginning. I need something that has to do with Leon and bunnies)

(Next bot will be another Re9 requested bot. See you all then <3)
